LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS LYNNET SPIEGEL AND JEFFREY'S NATURAL PET FOODS COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, TO STRIKE DEFENDANT SPEIGEL FROM THE COMPLAINT AND CERTAIN PORTIONS OF THE THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT - MOTION TO STRIKE DEFENDANT SPIEGEL FROM THIS ACTION IS GRANTED AND THE OTHER PORTIONS WHICH WERE ADDRESSED IN THE MOTION TO STRIKE AS TO WHICH NO OPPOSITION WAS OFFERED IN THE PLEADING. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PLEADED A BASIS FOR ALTER EGO LIABILITY. MS. EGGLESTON TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
